intensity_note: Mon is the hardest day mentally. That's the point.
opener: It's Monday. The only people who dread Mondays are the ones who spent Sunday pretending last week didn't happen.
challenge: Block 90 uninterrupted minutes and produce something real. No Slack. No email. Just output.
quote: Every person you admire works on days they don't feel like it. That's why you admire them.
